case_title: MOSSER, NEVEO vs. STADLER, JASON et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT HASTINGS, BLAKELY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STADLER, JASON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 900 OAK ST #6, LEASE FORFEITED
